title: polystichum unitum
intro: Polystichum unitum, also known as the Lady fern or the Lady-fern polypody, is a type of evergreen fern native to the western coast of North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. Consuming the plant is believed to provide several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and aiding in the treatment of urinary tract infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
